briefdescription.para: This function is the main entry point for the video test example using the XDsiTxSs driver.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the MIPI DSI RX Subsystem core.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if any of MIPI DSI RX Subsystem sub-core self test failed.
XST_SUCCESS, if all of MIPI DSI RX Subsystem sub-core self test passed.

briefdescription.para: This function wait until the DMA channel halts.

parameterdescription.para: specifies VdmaChannel is MM2S or S2MM .

simplesect.para: MM2S_HALT_SUCCESS, S2MM_HALT_SUCCESS in success MM2S_HALT_FAILURE, S2MM_HALT_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function to setup Horizontal size and stride.

parameterdescription.para: specifies VdmaChannel is MM2S or S2MM

briefdescription.para: This function to setup the VDMA Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: specifies VdmaChannel is MM2S or S2MM
specifies number of frames to transfer

briefdescription.para: This function to start mm2s or s2mm VdmaChannel - write the vertical size.

parameterdescription.para: specifies VdmaChannel is MM2S or S2MM

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for XDsiTxSs self test example.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the self test example passed.
XST_FAILURE if the self test example was unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the XDsiTxSs driver.

detaileddescription.para: It performs a video test on the MIPI DSI Tx Subsystem. It tests DSI TX functionality with following sequence. Presently the application is supporting only RGB888 format. 3 bytes per pixel BRAM (MM2S)VDMA (MM2S)DSI TX CSI RX (S2MM)VDMA(S2MM)BRAM This function will read input from BRAM0, provide BRAM input to VDMA MM2S, VDMA feeds MM2S input to DSI TX controller, the output of DSI will be connected to CSI RX controller. The output of CSI given to S2MM of VDMA. VDMA writes S2MM data on BRAM1. Finally compare BRAM0 and BRAM1 data User has to provide all necessary inputs as per desired resolution

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ram 11/2/16 Initial Release for MIPI DSI TX subsystem 1.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028.
